PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Mason Gomez.

Ms. Stoneman apologizes for the tardiness of the inventory and appraisal, states that the property has been appraised for $45,000.00, and notes that they are ready to close. The matter was continued to April 3,2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property was continued to March 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A response to the Examiner's notes is to be filed three court days prior to that date. If no appearance on that date, the petition will go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
